children.heading: .—Additional Match
children.label: a .—Additional Match
children.text: The Secretary may increase rehabilitation grants or innovation grants authorized in by providing an additional match equal to the total match provided by a State of up to 15 percent of total project costs. The Federal matching amount shall not exceed 85 percent of total project cost.section 200503 of this title

children.heading: .—Adequate Implementation of Local Recovery Plans
children.label: b .—Adequate Implementation of Local Recovery Plans

children.text: that local recovery plans and programs are adequately implemented by cooperating with the Secretary in monitoring local park and recreation recovery plans and programs; and
consistency of the plans and programs, where appropriate, with State recreation policies as set forth in statewide comprehensive outdoor recreation plans.
